title: Suite isolation retrofit: HOME/USERPROFILE sentinel redirect in runOnboard, green against the CURRENT script
action: Retrofit hermetic isolation into test_onboard_bee.mjs BEFORE any skill-sync implementation exists (panel F5/F7, revised per panel-2 NEW-1): the suite's spawn helper (runOnboard, line ~37) gives every spawned onboard process a PER-CASE fake home - HOME and USERPROFILE in the child env point at a fresh fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), ...)) dir owned by that test case (cases that span multiple runOnboard calls, e.g. apply-then-recheck, pass the SAME fake home explicitly). The real home is unreachable by construction; non-mutation guarantees are PER-CASE opt-in assertions (a case that must not touch home snapshots ITS OWN fake home before/after), never a suite-wide invariant - later cells intentionally write skills into their case homes. Assert the env plumbing itself: a helper-level check that no spawn ever inherits process.env.HOME/USERPROFILE unmodified. No production code changes; no override flag/env in onboard_bee.mjs (D1). Every existing assertion keeps its semantics. The suite must pass green against the CURRENT onboard_bee.mjs.

truths: Every spawned onboard process receives a per-case fake HOME and USERPROFILE (never the real ones - asserted in the helper)
Multi-call cases share one explicit fake home; single-call cases get a fresh one
Full suite green against the unmodified current script
prohibitions: No production override mechanism (no BEE_SKILLS_TARGET or similar) anywhere
No assertion weakened or deleted (frozen judge)

trace.outcome: Retrofitted hermetic per-case fake HOME/USERPROFILE isolation into test_onboard_bee.mjs's runOnboard spawn helper before any skill-sync implementation exists. Multi-call cases (tmp, proseTmp, flipTmp, cmTmp) share one explicit fake home; single-call cases (detTmp, ptrTmp) get a fresh auto-generated one. Added a suite-wide helper-level invariant asserting no spawn ever inherited the real HOME/USERPROFILE unmodified. Full suite green (109 checks, 0 failures, 0 skips) against the unmodified current onboard_bee.mjs; no production code touched; no override flag/env introduced.
